description: Canonical keyword ownership map so one keyword resolves to one primary page type and slug.
rules: Each keyword may have only one canonical owner page.
Category and landing pages must not share the same primary keyword.
Close variants may be mapped as support keywords, not separate canonical pages.
Every canonical page must declare one primary keyword and optional support keywords.

records.notes: Commercial keyword mapped to one landing page only.
Category keyword kept separate from the landing page intent.
